form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.04) at this track in a Special conditions Veteran race, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and seven places from 21 starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when third (19.65) at Healesville, making it two placings on end. Has a low draw. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Healesville over 300m in 17.28. Followed that up with a minor placing over 350m at Healesville at Grade 5 six days ago. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Valencia Jim at Sale last start over 435m (25.00). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.
